papers.title: Let It Be Simple: One-Step Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract_snippet: Diffusion-based vision-language-action (VLA) models often inherit the image-generation view: actions are generated by iterative denoising. We argue that VLA action generation has a different condition-target structure: the policy is conditioned on rich observations, language, and state, but predicts only a compact, low-dimensional action chunk. Under this asymmetry, strong one-step action generation should not necessarily require the advanced one-step methods developed for image synthesis. We ke
papers.reason: 提出 VLA 单步动作生成方法，摒弃 Diffusion Policy 的迭代去噪过程以显著提升推理速度。核心亮点是简化了条件-目标结构，若代码开源将极大降低 VLA 部署延迟，具备高工程复用价值。

papers.title: TempoVLA: Learning Speed-Controllable Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.abstract_snippet: Robot manipulation alternates between low-risk transit phases that call for fast execution and high-risk contact stages that demand slow, precise motion. Yet existing Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) only inherit a single fixed speed from training demonstrations. Prior efforts to accelerate VLAs through model compression, KV-cache reuse, or reinforcement learning only shift the policy from one fixed speed to another, and leave deceleration almost unexplored. We observe that the magnitude of
papers.reason: 解决现有 VLA 固定执行速度的局限，引入速度可控策略以区分快速移动与精细接触阶段。该方法增强了机器人在高风险任务中的安全性与效率，为 VLA 时序控制提供了新的可复用训练范式。

papers.title: Geodesic Flow Matching on a Riemannian Degradation Manifold for Blind Image Restoration
papers.abstract_snippet: Blind image restoration requires recovering clean images from observations corrupted by unknown and potentially mixed degradations. While recent deterministic flow-based methods model restoration as transport processes that map degraded images to clean ones, they typically rely on Euclidean interpolation, implicitly assuming linear degradation geometry. papers.reason: 纯计算机视觉领域的图像恢复研究，聚焦黎曼流形上的盲图像去噪算法。无机器人操作场景、无 Embodied AI 关联，属于非相关领域论文。
